creator: scjamorim@bsd.com.br
text:
Hi Martin,



     Which version of FreeBSD do you use? I was the last to update the
port, I am not the maintainer, but knowing the version you're using, I
will try to install it and check the error you are having.


Regards,

Sylvio Cesar.


2009/6/30 Martin Tournoij <carpetsmoker@rwxrwxrwx.net>:
> Hello,
>
> Sorry for the late reply, haven't had a X11 enabled FreeBSD machine to my
> disposal for a while (Also had some problems with the mangled patch, and
> later I forgot :-| ).
>
> Please revert this patch, plugins do not load correctly. This is a known
> problem and the reason I didn't update this port in the first place. This
> problem comes and goes with different scribus versions, to date I haven't
> found a solution.
>
> Regards,
> Martin
>
